text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest has arrived, and the
entire area is jam-packed with people. Peeking
through the crowd, I spot familiar faces by the
gate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Reports of lost children are on the rise. Please be
extra careful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If you don't know where to go, find an
Umamusume! Just look for—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: —ears like these, and—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: —a tail like this!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please let us know if there is anything else you
require.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh! This pose... It's so hard to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I know. It's meant to be visually appealing,
but it is rather awkward.
choice_data_list: I see you're taking your guide job seriously.
I see you're taking your guide job seriously.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahh?! I'm right here to help you! Don't be scared!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... Calm down, Spe. You're not talking
with a lost child.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, you're—Grass's trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... You aren't lost, then? What a rel—

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Uwaaaaah! Big Brotherrrr!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my! But this little girl actually does seem lost.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: L-l-lost?! Then it's our job to—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-where'd she go?! ...Graaass?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I see... You became separated from your
older brother, yes?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh... He ran off somewhere... And now I can't
find him...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... This way, madam! Your daughter's right over here!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mommy?!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness! I was looking all around for you!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you both so much... And I believe someone
else has something to say as well?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. She can stay lost for all I care.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Goodness...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You know, your sister was calling for you this
whole time.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
And? She's a loud, annoying brat, and I wish she'd
go away!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Hey! Don't talk about your sister like that!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll just volunteer to take your place and
become her "big sister."

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'd be so happy to have another cute little sister
around. Hehehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Wha? B-Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: S-stop! Where do you think you're taking her?! She's my sister!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess someone wants to be a big brother
now after all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Spilled water never returns... There's no erasing
words once said.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If there's something you hold dear, you should
take proper actions to preserve it.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: W-we made up, okay?! What more do you want?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Just for you to run along and have fun
together!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you flatter me. It's only proper to be a good
role model for those younger than you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though I must say, being strict for a child's sake
does sting inside.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll quietly accept your words of
appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her conflicting feelings, Grass Wonder
does an excellent job as a guide, staying firm,
polite, and true to herself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Just for you to run along and have fun
together!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hmph! ...C'mon, where are we going next?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, anywhere you want!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Yeesh.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it makes me a little jealous. His younger
sister clearly adores him dearly...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Eheh. Perhaps I'll call my sister tonight. It's been
so long since we spoke.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me. Have I never told you about her?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I must not have mentioned it, but I'm an older
sister.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. ♪ My sister's such an excellent student,
she even got invited to a boarding school back in
the States.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From there, I sit through nearly an hour of Grass
gushing about her little sister in America.
